ResearchProjectDef.label: feywing joint
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce fey wings rolled up into a joint that imparts a powerful high and leaves the person with a feeling of deep serenity.

ResearchProjectDef.label: beard wax
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce a quality hair wax specially made for styling the prodigious hair of the stoneborn.

ResearchProjectDef.label: miner's delight
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce a green and gold powder used by stoneborn quarry workers to enter a state of higher mental fortitude.

ResearchProjectDef.label: redspice
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce a spicy red powder made by grinding up bull horns, useful for removing the nauseating effects of hangovers.
